normalization.notes: Store Tibetan text in NFC while preserving source order for vowel signs, subjoined letters, tsheg, and shad punctuation. Analysis tooling may inspect root consonant, prefix, suffix, and stack structure without rewriting the source text.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: root consonants, vowel signs, tsheg-delimited syllables, prefixes, suffixes, subjoined letters, stacked clusters, and shad punctuation
segmentation.notes: Tibetan spacing is syllable-oriented rather than word-oriented. Count tsheg syllables, visible stacks, and teachable root-letter behavior separately because written clusters often encode more than the beginner pronunciation.
